flow.speaker: Friend A
flow.text: Oh, hey! This is my old photo album. I found it in my attic yesterday.

flow.speaker: User
flow.instruction: Ask about one of the photos

scenario.goal: discuss what people did after graduation and how they changed

flow.speaker: Former Classmate
flow.text: I can't believe it's been so long! You look exactly the same. Did you move out of the city after graduation?

flow.speaker: User
flow.instruction: Answer where you went and ask what they did.

flow.speaker: Former Classmate
flow.behavior: share a surprising story about a past job or travel

flow.speaker: Strict Interviewer
flow.text: Thank you for coming. I was looking at your resume. Tell me, why did you leave your last job?

flow.speaker: User
flow.instruction: Explain a reason in the past simple.

flow.speaker: Strict Interviewer
flow.behavior: ask follow-up questions about specific past projects

scenario.goal: reconstruct a timeline of events from yesterday

flow.speaker: Detective
flow.text: Please sit down. I need you to tell me exactly what you saw yesterday at 8:00 PM near the bank.

flow.speaker: User
flow.instruction: Describe what you were doing and what happened.

flow.speaker: Detective
flow.behavior: press for more specific details about the suspect's actions
